items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [synopsis].
items.summary: 一篇批判性评估论文综述指出，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛患者，在居家运动基础上增加物理治疗或励志短信并不能比单纯居家运动带来更多的疼痛改善。
items.curatedReason: 退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛患者，单靠居家运动效果不差，额外增加物理治疗或励志短信并未带来额外疼痛改善。这提示你在考虑增加干预时，要仔细评估性价比。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：对退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，增加物理治疗或励志短信并未比单纯居家运动带来额外疼痛改善 [简报]
items.summaryZh: 批判性评估论文指出，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛患者，相比单纯居家运动，额外增加物理治疗或励志短信并未在疼痛缓解上显示出额外益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: For degenerative meniscal tears and knee pain, home exercise alone is effective; adding physiotherapy or motivational texts didn't further reduce pain. Carefully assess cost-effectiveness when considering additional interventions.
items.limitation: 本条目为批判性评估论文的简报，未提供原始研究的具体细节（如样本量、具体干预方案和随访时间），可能无法全面评估其证据强度和适用性。
items.limitationEn: This item is a synopsis of a critically appraised paper and lacks specific details of the original study (e.g., sample size, intervention protocols, follow-up duration), precluding a full assessment of its evidence strength and applicability.
items.journal: Journal of physiotherapy

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: 一项使用 COSMIN 方法学进行的系统综述评估了躯干功能障碍量表 (TIS) 在卒中患者中的心理测量属性，确定了TIS在卒中康复中作为评估工具的证据质量和确定性。
items.curatedReason: TIS 在卒中康复中是可靠且有效的躯干功能评估工具，但要注意其在特定人群或语境下的局限性。结合 COSMIN 方法学，这篇综述为你的临床选择提供了高级别证据。
items.titleZh: 卒中后躯干功能障碍量表的心理测量属性：一项采用 COSMIN 方法学的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项运用COSMIN方法学的系统综述，评估了躯干功能障碍量表 (TIS) 在卒中患者中的心理测量属性，为该工具在卒中康复中的应用提供了证据质量和确定性评级。
items.curatedReasonEn: TIS is a reliable and valid trunk function assessment tool in stroke rehabilitation, but be aware of its limitations in specific populations or contexts. This review, utilizing COSMIN methodology, provides high-level evidence for your clinical choice.
items.limitation: 尽管评估了证据质量，但综述本身并未报告合并效应量或具体心理测量属性的数值，因此需要查阅原始研究以获取详细数据。
items.limitationEn: While evidence quality was assessed, the review itself did not report pooled effect sizes or specific psychometric property values, requiring consultation of original studies for detailed data.
items.journal: Physical therapy

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: 一项针对60名接受近端腘绳肌腱撕脱修复术患者的随机对照试验（n=30 CR组，n=30 AR组）显示，加速康复方案与保守康复方案在2年随访中，临床结局、力量恢复、功能对称性以及并发症/再损伤率方面无显著差异。
items.curatedReason: 对于近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复术后的康复，加速康复方案在两年内与保守方案在临床结局、力量恢复和功能对称性方面差异不大。你可以更积极地考虑加速康复。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌撕脱伤康复方案两年结局：纵向对比加速方案 (PHARRLAP) 研究：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项比较近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复术后康复方案的随机对照试验（n=60）发现，加速康复方案与保守康复方案在两年随访期内，临床结局、力量恢复和功能对称性方面并无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For proximal hamstring avulsion repair post-op rehab, accelerated protocols show comparable clinical outcomes, strength recovery, and functional symmetry to conservative protocols at two years. You can consider accelerated rehab more actively.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（每组30名患者），可能限制了检测到小效应差异的能力。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (30 patients per group) may limit its ability to detect small effect differences.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: 一篇批判性评估论文的评论指出，对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者，基于移动设备的肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心化肺康复效果相当，且在改善健康状况方面表现更佳。
items.curatedReason: 移动端肺康复与中心肺康复在改善 COPD 患者运动能力方面非劣效，且对健康状况改善更优。这意味着你可以更灵活地考虑远程肺康复方案，提高患者依从性。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：移动端肺康复在改善慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者运动能力方面与中心肺康复效果相当，健康状况改善更优 [评论]
items.summaryZh: 一篇批判性评估论文评论称，对于慢阻肺患者，移动端肺康复在改善运动能力上与中心化康复效果无显著差异，但在提升健康状况方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is non-inferior to center-based rehab for exercise capacity in COPD patients and superior for health status. You can consider remote pulmonary rehab options more flexibly to improve patient adherence.
items.limitation: 本条目为批判性评估论文的评论，未提供原始研究的具体细节（如样本量、干预持续时间等），因此无法全面评估证据强度。
items.limitationEn: This item is a commentary on a critically appraised paper, lacking specific details of the original study (e.g., sample size, intervention duration), thus preventing a full assessment of evidence strength.
items.journal: Journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: 一项对333名接受颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）的成年患者进行的回顾性队列研究发现，术前肌少症显著增加了3年内发生放射学邻近节段退变（ASD）的风险。
items.curatedReason: 颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后，肌少症是3年内发生邻近节段退变的风险因素。这提示术前肌少症评估和干预可能有助于改善长期预后。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后3年内邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，在333名接受颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术的患者中，术前存在肌少症会显著增加术后3年内发生邻近节段退变（ASD）的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia is a risk factor for adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years after Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion (ACDF). Preoperative sarcopenia assessment and intervention may improve long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，且主要结局为影像学上的邻近节段退变，其临床意义需要进一步研究确认。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, potentially subject to confounding factors and selection bias, and its primary outcome is radiographic adjacent segment degeneration, whose clinical significance requires further confirmation.
items.journal: Spine

items.title: Effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in the management of endometriosis symptoms: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: 一项系统综述和Meta分析评估了物理治疗方法和技术在改善子宫内膜异位症症状方面的有效性，发现现有证据的确定性被评为低到极低，主要关注疼痛缓解。
items.curatedReason: 对于子宫内膜异位症引起的症状，物理治疗技术和方法可能有益。在缺乏高确定性证据的情况下，你需要根据患者具体情况谨慎选择和应用，并关注其缓解疼痛的潜力。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗技术和方法在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性：一项系统综述与Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述与Meta分析评估了物理治疗技术在改善子宫内膜异位症症状方面的有效性，结果显示现有证据的确定性（GRADE评级）为低至极低，主要提示其对疼痛的潜在缓解作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physical therapy techniques and methods may be beneficial for endometriosis symptoms. Given the lack of high-certainty evidence, you should carefully select and apply interventions based on individual patient needs, focusing on their pain relief potential.
items.limitation: 虽然是系统综述和Meta分析，但证据的确定性通过GRADE方法评估为低至极低，表明现有证据强度不足以得出强有力的实践指导。
items.limitationEn: Despite being a systematic review and meta-analysis, the certainty of evidence was rated low to very low by the GRADE approach, indicating insufficient evidence strength for strong practice guidelines.
items.journal: Brazilian journal of physical therapy

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: The WHO global rehabilitation indicators represent a vital shift from counting disease to measuring functioning and lives lived with quality and dignity,1 and to ensuring rehabilitation is an essentia
items.curatedReason: WHO 呼吁在全球范围内将康复作为基本医疗服务，而非奢侈品，并且要投资于人而不是仅仅关注设备。这意味着，我们物理治疗师作为康复专业人士，在医疗系统中的重要性将持续提升，你应当积极关注政策动向。
items.titleZh: 让康复发挥作用：投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 世界卫生组织（WHO）的全球康复指标标志着从关注疾病到衡量功能和生活质量的转变，并呼吁康复应成为医疗保健的必要组成部分，而非附加奢侈品，强调投资于康复专业人才而非仅是设备。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WHO advocates for rehabilitation as an essential healthcare service globally, not a luxury, emphasizing investment in people over devices. This means physical therapists, as rehabilitation professionals, will see their importance in healthcare systems grow; you should actively monitor policy developments.
items.journal: The Lancet

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: 一项前瞻性队列研究发现，在荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者中，社会文化因素（如教育水平、移民背景）能预测非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛的短期和长期结局，基线以及3、6、12个月的疼痛强度、残疾和健康相关生活质量均与这些因素相关（n=1350）。
items.curatedReason: 社会文化因素对非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的短期和长期预后有预测作用。评估患者的社会经济和文化背景，有助于制定更全面的个体化康复计划。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的预测性社会文化因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对1350名非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究显示，教育水平和移民背景等社会文化因素，在基线以及3、6、12个月时，均可预测其疼痛强度、残疾程度及健康相关生活质量的短期和长期结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sociocultural factors predict short- and long-term outcomes in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain. Assess patients' socioeconomic and cultural backgrounds to develop more comprehensive, individualized rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究对象来自荷兰初级保健物理治疗，结果推广到其他人群或医疗系统时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was drawn from Dutch primary care physiotherapy, so findings should be cautiously generalized to other populations or healthcare systems.
items.journal: Pain

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: 一项针对60名终末期膝骨关节炎患者的前瞻性观察性信度研究显示，数字测痛仪在测量膝关节内侧（局部）和对侧前臂背侧（远程）的压力痛阈方面具有高相对信度（ICC > 0.75）。
items.curatedReason: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈测量中显示出高信度。在临床实践中使用该工具评估痛阈是可靠的。
items.titleZh: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈测量中的信度：一项单中心信度研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对60名终末期膝骨关节炎患者的研究发现，数字测痛仪在测量局部膝关节内侧和远程对侧前臂背侧的压力痛阈时，具有高相对信度（ICC > 0.75），表明该工具在临床实践中是可靠的。
items.curatedReasonEn: The digital algometer demonstrates high reliability for pressure pain threshold measurement in end-stage knee osteoarthritis. This tool is reliable for clinical pain threshold assessment.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果可能不适用于其他疼痛类型或疾病。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, so the results may not be applicable to other pain types or conditions.
items.journal: Physiotherapy theory and practice

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting
items.summary: 一篇范围综述旨在总结运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告方式。
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述总结了运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容。在制定此类患者的康复计划时，应参考综述提供的运动干预信息，以确保方案的全面性。
items.titleZh: 运动员长期腹股沟疼痛的康复：运动内容与报告的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 本范围综述旨在总结运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容及其报告方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review summarizes exercise content in rehabilitation for long-standing groin pain in athletes. When designing rehab plans for these patients, refer to the exercise intervention information provided to ensure comprehensive protocols.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，它主要侧重于映射现有文献的广度而非深度，并未对纳入研究的质量进行批判性评估，也未提供量化证据。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it focuses on mapping the breadth rather than depth of existing literature and does not critically appraise the quality of included studies or provide quantified evidence.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Comparison of ultrasound-guided lavage and subacromial bursa injection for calcific tendinitis: A prospective, randomized, double-blind trial
items.summary: 本研究旨在通过一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验，比较超声引导下肩峰下滑囊注射和超声引导下灌洗治疗钙化性肌腱炎的临床和超声结果。
items.curatedReason: 对于钙化性肌腱炎，超声引导下抽吸灌洗与滑囊注射的临床和超声结果对比值得关注。这项前瞻性随机双盲试验将提供两种常见干预手段的直接比较证据。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下灌洗与肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎的比较：一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在通过一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验，对比超声引导下灌洗与超声引导下肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎的临床和超声影像学效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: For calcific tendinitis, comparing clinical and ultrasonographic outcomes of ultrasound-guided lavage versus subacromial bursa injection is noteworthy. This prospective, randomized, double-blind trial will provide direct comparative evidence for two common interventions.
items.limitation: 摘要仅说明研究目的，未提供具体样本量、关键结局指标、干预细节或结果数据，因此无法评估其研究质量和潜在影响。
items.limitationEn: The abstract only states the study's aim without providing specific sample size, key outcome measures, intervention details, or results, thus precluding an assessment of its quality and potential impact.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis: clinical determinants and its association with bladder dysfunction in a multicenter study
items.summary: 本多中心研究旨在确定多发性硬化症（MS）中神经源性肠道功能障碍的患病率和严重程度，并识别与中度至重度肠道功能障碍相关的临床因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联。
items.curatedReason: 多发性硬化症（MS）患者的神经源性肠道功能障碍与膀胱功能障碍密切相关。这意味着在评估和管理MS患者时，你需要同时关注肠道和膀胱功能，并采取综合康复策略。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症的神经源性肠道功能障碍：多中心研究中的临床决定因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联
items.summaryZh: 本多中心研究旨在确定多发性硬化症患者中神经源性肠道功能障碍的患病率和严重程度，并识别与中重度肠道功能障碍相关的临床因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis (MS) patients is closely linked to bladder dysfunction. This means you need to address both bowel and bladder function during assessment and management of MS patients, adopting comprehensive rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 摘要仅说明研究目的，未提供具体样本量、研究设计、结局指标或结果数据，因此无法评估其研究质量和潜在影响。
items.limitationEn: The abstract only states the study's aim without providing specific sample size, study design, outcome measures, or results, thus precluding an assessment of its quality and potential impact.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: 一项针对68名持续性肩袖相关肩痛患者的非劣效性试点随机临床试验发现，与不含手法治疗的物理治疗相比，包含手法治疗的物理治疗在患者报告结局方面初步显示出潜在益处，并证实了完整随机临床试验的可行性。
items.curatedReason: 这项试点研究提示，在肩袖相关肩痛的物理治疗中，手法治疗可能作为运动疗法的有效辅助。虽然是初步结果，但值得关注手法治疗在复杂肌骨疼痛中的潜在价值。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗结合物理治疗对肩袖相关肩痛的有效性：一项试点随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项招募68名持续性肩袖相关肩痛患者的试点RCT发现，含手法治疗组与不含手法治疗组相比，在患者报告结局上初步显示出积极趋势，并验证了未来大规模RCT的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study suggests manual therapy may be an effective adjunct to exercise therapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. While preliminary, it highlights the potential value of manual therapy in complex musculoskeletal pain.
items.limitation: 这是一项非劣效性试点研究，样本量有限（n=68），仅探讨了初步治疗效果和完整RCT的可行性，不能得出确切的疗效结论。
items.limitationEn: This was a non-inferiority pilot study with a limited sample size (n=68), exploring preliminary treatment effects and feasibility for a full RCT, thus definitive efficacy conclusions cannot be drawn.
items.journal: Archives of physiotherapy

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: 一项针对55名英国儿科临床医生（54名物理治疗师）的全国调查和焦点小组研究发现，他们普遍认为将成人版肌肉骨骼健康问卷 (MSK-HQ) 调整用于8-18岁儿童和青少年的肌肉骨骼护理具有相关性。
items.curatedReason: MSK-HQ 在儿科肌肉骨骼护理中的适应性得到了英国临床医生的认可。这为儿童和青少年 MSK 健康评估工具的开发提供了方向。
items.titleZh: 改编 MSK-HQ 用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理：一项全国调查和物理治疗师焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项英国全国调查及焦点小组研究显示，55名儿科临床医生（主要为物理治疗师）普遍认为，将成人版肌肉骨骼健康问卷 (MSK-HQ) 调整后用于8-18岁儿童和青少年肌肉骨骼护理具有高度相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: UK clinicians recognize the adaptability of MSK-HQ for pediatric musculoskeletal care. This provides direction for developing MSK health assessment tools for children and adolescents.
items.limitation: 本研究基于英国临床医生（54名物理治疗师和1名足病医生）的反馈，可能存在地理和专业范围的局限性，不代表全球观点。
items.limitationEn: This study is based on feedback from UK clinicians (54 physiotherapists and 1 podiatrist), which may limit its generalizability geographically and professionally.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: 一项范围综述系统地梳理了截至2025年11月关于 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中应用的研究证据，发现现有研究主要关注技术如何被研究，而非其有效性或临床准备度。
items.curatedReason: ChatGPT 在物理治疗中的应用日益增多，但目前研究主要集中在技术本身，而非临床实践的有效性。在将其引入临床前，需要更多关于其实际效果和安全性的证据。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的效用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述截至2025年11月的文献，系统地绘制了ChatGPT在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的应用证据，指出当前研究重点是如何研究该技术，而非其临床有效性或实践准备度。
items.curatedReasonEn: ChatGPT's use in physiotherapy is growing, but current research focuses on the technology itself rather than clinical effectiveness. More evidence on its practical impact and safety is needed before clinical integration.
items.limitation: 本综述侧重于ChatGPT在物理治疗中如何被研究，而非其效果，因此未能提供关于ChatGPT在临床实践中是否有效或已准备好应用的证据。
items.limitationEn: This review focused on how ChatGPT has been studied in physiotherapy, not its effectiveness, thus it does not provide evidence on whether ChatGPT is effective or ready for clinical practice.
items.journal: Physiotherapy

items.title: Perceptions of Chronic Low Back Pain and Physiotherapy in India: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: 一项针对20名印度慢性下腰痛患者的定性研究，通过半结构式访谈和解释现象学分析，深入探讨了他们在社会文化背景下对慢性下腰痛和物理治疗的看法。
items.curatedReason: 在印度，文化和社会因素显著影响慢性下腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知和利用。理解这些背景对改进康复服务的可及性和依从性至关重要。
items.titleZh: 印度慢性下腰痛和物理治疗的认知：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对20名印度慢性下腰痛患者的定性研究，深入探讨了他们在社会文化背景下对慢性下腰痛和物理治疗的感知，揭示了影响康复服务利用的独特文化因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: In India, cultural and social factors significantly impact how chronic low back pain patients perceive and use physiotherapy. Understanding these contexts is crucial for improving rehabilitation service accessibility and adherence.
items.limitation: 这是一项定性研究，样本量小（20名参与者），结果反映了特定文化背景下的感知，外推至其他文化群体需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (20 participants); its findings reflect perceptions within a specific cultural context and should be cautiously extrapolated to other cultural groups.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Demographic disparities in health-related social needs among caregivers of stroke survivors: an exploratory cross-sectional study.
items.summary: 一项针对81名美国卒中幸存者照护者的横断面调查发现，他们平均有6.5项未满足的健康相关社会需求（95% CI [5.69, 7.25]），其中种族和民族少数群体照护者的总需求负担显著更高。
items.curatedReason: 卒中幸存者照护者面临的健康相关社会需求存在显著的人口统计学差异，尤其是有色人种照护者。这提示临床医师在支持照护者时，需要考虑更广泛的社会因素。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者照护者健康相关社会需求的人口统计学差异：一项探索性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对81名美国卒中幸存者照护者的横断面研究显示，他们平均存在6.5项未满足的健康相关社会需求，其中少数族裔照护者的总需求负担显著高于其他群体。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke survivor caregivers face significant demographic disparities in health-related social needs, especially among racial and ethnic minority caregivers. Clinicians must consider broader social factors when supporting caregivers.
items.limitation: 这是一项探索性横断面研究，样本量较小（n=81），且在特定时间段（2024年11月至2025年6月）收集数据，结果可能存在选择偏差和时效性限制。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory cross-sectional study with a small sample size (n=81) and data collected within a specific timeframe (November 2024 to June 2025), which may introduce selection bias and temporal limitations.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Management of Labral Tears Associated with Glenohumeral Instability in Athletes.
items.summary: 一篇综述旨在探讨盂肱关节不稳伴盂唇撕裂运动员的评估和管理，重点关注康复和重返运动，指出后盂唇损伤和联合盂唇囊损伤的发生率可能比之前认为的更高。
items.curatedReason: 盂唇撕裂伴盂肱关节不稳的运动员管理，康复和重返运动策略是核心。这篇综述提醒你关注前后盂唇损伤的最新认知和管理进展。
items.titleZh: 运动员盂肱关节不稳相关盂唇撕裂的管理
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了盂肱关节不稳伴盂唇撕裂运动员的评估与管理，强调了康复和重返运动的重要性，并指出后盂唇及联合囊盂唇损伤的发生率可能高于既往认知。
items.curatedReasonEn: For athletes with labral tears and glenohumeral instability, rehabilitation and return-to-sport strategies are key. This review highlights recent insights and management advances for anterior and posterior labral injuries.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，而非原始研究，因此其结论基于现有文献的综合，可能存在纳入文献的偏倚，且未提供量化证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, not an original research study, so its conclusions are based on a synthesis of existing literature, which may have publication bias and does not provide quantified evidence.
items.journal: Current reviews in musculoskeletal medicine

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: 一项针对80名0-18岁创伤性脑损伤儿童的回顾性队列研究发现，在PICU住院的前14天，高强度活动在OT和PT评估中分别占比53%和56.3%，而镇静/镇痛是活动的主要障碍。
items.curatedReason: 在儿科重症监护室（PICU）中，创伤性脑损伤儿童的早期活动面临高比例的镇静限制。这表明需要更积极地管理镇静，以促进早期康复。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期活动面临的障碍和趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项针对80名创伤性脑损伤儿童的回顾性研究显示，在儿科重症监护室中，早期高强度活动在OT和PT评估中占比分别为53%和56.3%，但镇静/镇痛是实施活动的主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early mobilization for children with traumatic brain injury in the pediatric ICU faces high sedation limitations. This indicates a need for more proactive sedation management to facilitate early rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，且为单中心数据，可能存在选择偏倚和结果的外推性限制。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study with single-center data, which may lead to selection bias and limit the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: 一项针对10名健康老年人和46名住院患者的研究验证了PREEMPT活动监测器，发现其在测量步长、步数、步行时间、久坐时间及活动时间等五项移动性指标方面，与视频真实数据相比具有良好准确性和有效性。
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 活动监测器在住院患者中具有良好的准确性和可用性。你可以考虑将这种设备纳入临床实践，以客观追踪老年患者的活动量和改善移动性。
items.titleZh: 住院患者活动监测器验证：患者/居民移动性追踪器 (PREEMPT)
items.summaryZh: 一项针对10名健康老年人和46名住院患者的研究验证了PREEMPT活动监测器，发现其在测量步长、步数、步行时间、久坐和活动时间等指标上，与视频数据相比具有良好的准确性和有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor shows good accuracy and usability in hospitalized patients. You can consider incorporating this device into clinical practice to objectively track activity levels and improve mobility in older adults.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（10名健康老年人和46名住院患者），且仅评估了特定移动性指标，其结果在更大范围和更多样的临床情境中的通用性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study involved a small sample size (10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients) and assessed only specific mobility metrics, which may limit the generalizability of its findings to broader and more diverse clinical settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts.
items.summary: 一项过程评估研究描述了“Live Long Walk Strong”老年人移动性物理治疗项目在美国退伍军人事务部下属的城市门诊、乡村门诊、专业护理机构和远程医疗等四种不同临床环境中实施时的适应性及其所遇到的障碍（n=11名物理治疗师/助理）。
items.curatedReason: “Live Long Walk Strong”项目在不同临床环境中均可成功实施，提示适应性是提高老年康复项目可及性的关键。在将成熟项目引入新环境时，应注重其适应性。
items.titleZh: 实施“Live Long Walk Strong”：在不同背景下调整物理治疗项目的实践证据
items.summaryZh: 一项过程评估研究显示，“Live Long Walk Strong”老年移动性物理治疗项目在美国退伍军人事务部的四种不同临床环境中，通过适应性调整成功实施，突显了适应性对于项目推广的关键作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: The "Live Long Walk Strong" program successfully adapts to diverse clinical settings, highlighting that adaptability is key to enhancing the accessibility of geriatric rehabilitation programs. Emphasize adaptability when introducing established programs into new environments.
items.limitation: 这是一项过程评估，而非随机对照试验，未能提供项目对患者结局的量化有效性证据，且参与物理治疗师/助理仅11名。
items.limitationEn: This was a process evaluation, not an RCT, and did not provide quantified evidence of the program's effectiveness on patient outcomes. Only 11 physical therapists/assistants participated.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Physiotherapy management of Long-COVID: an evidence-based approach.
items.summary: 一篇综述描述了长新冠（Long-COVID）的异质性、偶发性和多系统性特征，并基于现有证据，阐述了针对该疾病后遗症的物理治疗管理策略。
items.curatedReason: 长新冠的物理治疗管理应基于当前的证据，采取多系统和个体化的方法。关注“隐形疾病”患者的需求，帮助他们应对复杂的症状。
items.titleZh: 长新冠的物理治疗管理：一种基于证据的方法
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述基于现有证据，阐述了长新冠（Long-COVID）的物理治疗管理策略，强调其异质性、偶发性和多系统性，并指出管理策略对改善患者生活质量的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physiotherapy management for Long-COVID should be evidence-based, multisystem, and individualized. Focus on patients with "invisible illnesses" to help them cope with complex symptoms.
items.limitation: 这是一篇基于现有证据的综述，而非原始研究，因此其结论的强度受限于所引用文献的质量和可用性。
items.limitationEn: This is a review based on existing evidence, not original research, so the strength of its conclusions is limited by the quality and availability of the cited literature.
items.journal: Brazilian journal of physical therapy

items.title: Health Literacy During Inpatient Rehabilitation and Its Association with One-Year Health and Functional Outcomes in Individuals with Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: 本研究旨在评估创伤性脊髓损伤患者在住院康复期间有限健康素养的普遍性及其相关因素，并考察有限健康素养与一年后健康和功能结局不佳的关联。
items.curatedReason: 在创伤性脊髓损伤（SCI）住院康复期间，健康素养水平低的患者在一年后的健康和功能结局更差。评估患者的健康素养，并提供适当的教育支持，对于优化康复效果至关重要。
items.titleZh: 住院康复期间健康素养与创伤性脊髓损伤患者一年后健康和功能结局的关联
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在评估创伤性脊髓损伤患者在住院康复期间健康素养的普遍性及影响因素，并探讨其与一年后较差的健康和功能结局之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients with low health literacy during inpatient rehabilitation for traumatic spinal cord injury (SCI) have poorer health and functional outcomes at one year. Assessing health literacy and providing appropriate educational support is crucial for optimizing rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项旨在评估关联性的研究，不能确立因果关系；且只关注了住院康复期间的健康素养，可能未能捕捉其动态变化或更广泛的社会决定因素。
items.limitationEn: This study aims to assess associations, not establish causality; it focuses solely on health literacy during inpatient rehabilitation, potentially missing dynamic changes or broader social determinants.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of Aerobic Exercise on Inflammatory Biomarkers, Pain Intensity, and Quality of Life in Patients with Non-Specific Chronic Low Back Pain: A Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: 一项针对41名非特异性慢性下腰痛患者的随机对照试验发现，为期12周的有氧运动结合健康教育显著改善了炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量，而健康教育对照组无此改善。
items.curatedReason: 有氧运动显著改善了非特异性慢性下腰痛患者的炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量。将其纳入你的常规康复方案，作为一线干预。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动对非特异性慢性下腰痛患者炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对41名非特异性慢性下腰痛患者的随机对照试验显示，为期12周的有氧运动显著改善了患者的炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量，而健康教育对照组则无此改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: Aerobic exercise significantly improves inflammatory biomarkers, pain intensity, and quality of life in patients with non-specific chronic low back pain. Incorporate it into your standard rehabilitation protocols as a first-line intervention.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（n=41），可能需要更大规模的试验来确认这些结果，并进一步探索长期效果。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively small (n=41), and larger trials may be needed to confirm these results and explore long-term effects.

items.title: Effects of electrical stimulation on lower limb function after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a systematic review and network meta-analysis | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项系统综述和网络 Meta 分析比较了不同电刺激模式结合康复训练对 ACL 重建术后患者下肢功能改善的治疗效果。
items.curatedReason: 对于 ACL 重建术后患者，电刺激结合康复训练能显著改善下肢功能。这份网络 Meta 分析为你提供了不同电刺激模式的比较，指导你优化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 电刺激对ACL重建术后下肢功能影响的系统综述和网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络 Meta 分析比较了不同电刺激模式联合康复训练对 ACL 重建术后患者下肢功能改善的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients post-ACL reconstruction, electrical stimulation combined with rehabilitation training significantly improves lower limb function. This network meta-analysis provides a comparison of different electrical stimulation modalities, guiding you to optimize rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 网络 Meta 分析中的间接比较可能存在局限性，需注意异质性。
items.limitationEn: Indirect comparisons in network meta-analysis may have limitations, and heterogeneity needs to be considered.

items.title: Six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a retrospective cohort study - Clinical Rheumatology
items.summary: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，为期六次的非手术运动方案可带来长达18个月的持续益处。
items.curatedReason: 针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，六次非手术运动方案可带来长达 18 个月的持续益处。这给你与患者和骨科医生讨论保守治疗提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 六次非手术运动方案为终末期膝骨关节炎带来长达18个月的持续益处：回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究表明，针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，为期六次的非手术运动方案能提供长达18个月的持续益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: A six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients awaiting TKR. This provides strong evidence for you to discuss conservative treatment with patients and orthopedic surgeons.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，存在潜在的选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, subject to potential selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Tale of quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL ...
items.summary: 一项带有纵向和多变量 Meta 分析的系统综述，详细探讨了 ACL 重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。
items.curatedReason: 这项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述深入分析了ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。这为你提供了评估术后恢复和制定力量训练计划的关键证据。
items.titleZh: ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的叙述：一项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述，详细探讨了ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review with longitudinal and multivariate meta-analysis deeply analyzes changes in quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL reconstruction. This provides you with critical evidence for evaluating postoperative recovery and developing strength training plans.
items.limitation: Meta分析的异质性可能影响结果的普遍适用性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in meta-analysis may affect the general applicability of the results.

items.title: Management and implementation of intermittent catheterisation in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction: a clinical practice guideline in Germany – update 3.0 | International Urology and Nephrology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 德国更新了针对神经源性下尿路功能障碍患者间歇性导尿的管理和实施临床实践指南（3.0版）。
items.curatedReason: 德国更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿的临床实践指南，重点关注管理和实施。如果你在服务神经科患者，尤其是来自德国或在类似监管环境下执业，这份指南是必备参考。
items.titleZh: 德国神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿管理与实施临床实践指南更新3.0版
items.summaryZh: 德国更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍患者间歇性导尿管理和实施的临床实践指南（3.0版）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Germany has updated its clinical practice guideline for intermittent catheterization in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction, focusing on management and implementation. If you serve neurological patients, especially those from Germany or practicing in similar regulatory environments, this guideline is an essential reference.

items.title: Fusogenic therapy restored spinal cord function after complete transection - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: 一个国际研究团队通过融合疗法和综合康复，在动物模型中成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能，该研究成果已发表在《PLOS One》杂志。
items.curatedReason: 国际团队在动物模型中通过融合疗法和综合康复，成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。这预示着脊髓损伤的康复突破，虽然仍处于动物实验阶段，但值得密切关注。
items.titleZh: 融合疗法恢复了脊髓完全横断后的功能
items.summaryZh: 国际团队在动物模型中利用融合疗法和综合康复，成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: An international team has successfully restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models, using fusogenic therapy combined with comprehensive rehabilitation. This heralds a breakthrough in spinal cord injury rehabilitation; though still in animal trials, it warrants close attention.
items.limitation: 这是一项动物模型研究，结果能否转化到人体尚不确定。
items.limitationEn: This is an animal model study, and it is uncertain whether the results can be translated to humans.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: 一项定性分析发现，275名ACL损伤患者中，决定重返运动的关键因素包括“动机与驱动力”、“治疗与康复”以及“医学许可与准备度”三大类。
items.curatedReason: 患者决定 ACL 损伤后重返运动的关键因素是心理状态、努力程度和支持。评估和干预时，不只看生理指标，还要纳入这些主观要素。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力与支持——ACL损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX队列定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对275名ACL损伤患者的定性分析显示，患者决定重返运动的关键因素可归纳为“动机与驱动力”、“治疗与康复”及“医学许可与准备度”三类。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients' decision to return to sport after ACL injury hinges on mindset, effort, and support. When assessing and intervening, incorporate these subjective factors beyond just physiological metrics.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，无法提供量化效应或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a qualitative analysis and cannot provide quantitative effects or causal relationships.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Acupuncture for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases: mechanisms and clinical evidence | European Spine Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一篇综述探讨了针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的机制和临床证据。
items.curatedReason: 对于退行性腰椎疾病术后康复，针灸的作用机制和临床证据正被系统性回顾。这提示你可以关注其作为辅助治疗的潜力，但尚需高水平证据支持。
items.titleZh: 针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的机制与临床证据
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的作用机制和临床证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Acupuncture's mechanisms and clinical evidence for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases are being systematically reviewed. This suggests you can explore its potential as an adjunctive therapy, but higher-level evidence is still needed.
items.limitation: 这是一篇综述，而非原始研究，证据强度有局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a review, not an original study, so the evidence strength is limited.

items.title: Urogenital Hiatus Closure System: A Framework for Understanding how Muscle, Motor Control, and Fascial Connections Interact in Normal and Failed Closure
items.summary: 一项研究提出了泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统框架，以理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接在正常和功能失调闭合中的相互作用。
items.curatedReason: 这份关于泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统的框架性研究，有助于你更深入地理解盆底功能障碍的肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接的相互作用。在评估盆底功能时，应综合考虑这些因素。
items.titleZh: 泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统：理解肌肉、运动控制与筋膜连接在正常和失效闭合中相互作用的框架
items.summaryZh: 一项研究提出了泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统框架，以帮助理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接在正常及功能失调闭合中的相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This framework study on the urogenital hiatus closure system helps you gain a deeper understanding of the interaction between muscles, motor control, and fascial connections in pelvic floor dysfunction. When assessing pelvic floor function, these factors should be considered comprehensively.
items.limitation: 这是一项框架性研究，并非干预性试验，没有具体治疗效果数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework study, not an interventional trial, so there is no specific treatment outcome data.

items.title: Functional Status after Ventral Hernia Repair: Longitudinal Trends and the Limits of Improvement
items.summary: 一项前瞻性试点研究（NCT05142618）分析了腹壁疝修复术后患者的功能状态，通过定时起立行走（TUG）和五次坐站（5xSTS）测试评估，发现功能评分随时间改善，但存在改善的局限性。
items.curatedReason: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态在术后会随时间改善，但存在改善的局限性。这提示你在术后康复中，应现实地设定患者功能恢复目标，并关注长期功能维持。
items.titleZh: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态：纵向趋势与改善的局限性
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性研究评估了腹壁疝修复术后功能状态，发现TUG和5xSTS测试评分随时间改善，但存在改善局限性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Functional status after ventral hernia repair improves over time post-surgery, but with limitations. This suggests you should set realistic functional recovery goals for patients during postoperative rehabilitation and focus on long-term functional maintenance.
items.limitation: 这是一项试点研究，样本量和随访时间有限，长期结果需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot study with limited sample size and follow-up duration; long-term results require further validation.

items.title: Remotely delivered resistance training program in adult sarcoma survivors: a pilot study | BMC Cancer | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项单臂、前瞻性试点研究评估了远程交付的监督性渐进式阻力训练计划在成人肉瘤幸存者中改善身体功能的可行性。
items.curatedReason: 远程监督阻力训练对成人肉瘤幸存者具有可行性，并有望改善其身体功能。这意味着你可以考虑将远程康复模式应用于这类特殊人群，提高治疗可及性。
items.titleZh: 远程递送阻力训练项目对成人肉瘤幸存者的试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂、前瞻性试点研究评估了远程监督阻力训练计划对成人肉瘤幸存者身体功能改善的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Remotely supervised resistance training is feasible for adult sarcoma survivors and shows promise in improving physical functioning. This means you can consider applying remote rehabilitation models to this special population to improve treatment accessibility.
items.limitation: 这是一项单臂、前瞻性研究，缺乏对照组，无法排除安慰剂效应。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-arm, pre-post study lacking a control group, thus unable to rule out placebo effects.

items.title: Transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury: individual neurophysiological and clinical responses | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项研究探讨了经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者中的个体神经生理和临床反应。
items.curatedReason: 此研究结合了经皮脊髓电刺激与上肢机器人训练，提示了慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者个体化神经生理和临床反应的潜力。这为你在神经康复中整合先进技术提供了思路。
items.titleZh: 经皮脊髓电刺激结合上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤中的个体神经生理和临床反应
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了经皮脊髓电刺激与上肢机器人训练在慢性卒中和脊髓损伤患者中引发的个体神经生理和临床反应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study, combining transcutaneous spinal stimulation with upper extremity robotic training, highlights the potential for individualized neurophysiological and clinical responses in chronic stroke and spinal cord injury patients. This provides insight into integrating advanced technologies into your neurorehabilitation practice.
items.limitation: 研究关注个体化反应，可能样本量较小，结果外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on individualized responses, potentially involving a small sample size, so the generalizability of the results should be considered cautiously.

items.title: Personalizing post-stroke symptom management: integrating network analysis and in silico intervention to identify subgroup-specific targets | BMC Neurology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项研究整合了网络分析和体内干预，旨在识别亚组特异性靶点，以实现卒中后症状的个性化管理。
items.curatedReason: 利用网络分析和体内干预个性化卒中后症状管理，识别亚组特异性靶点。这意味着你可以根据患者的症状交互模式，更精准地制定个体化康复方案，提升疗效。
items.titleZh: 个性化卒中后症状管理：整合网络分析和体内干预以识别亚组特异性靶点
items.summaryZh: 一项研究结合网络分析与体内干预，旨在通过识别亚组特异性靶点来个性化卒中后症状管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: Personalizing post-stroke symptom management using network analysis and in silico interventions to identify subgroup-specific targets. This means you can tailor individualized rehabilitation plans more precisely based on patients' symptom interaction patterns, improving treatment effectiveness.
items.limitation: 这项研究是利用网络分析和体内干预的计算模型，尚未经过大规模临床验证。
items.limitationEn: This study uses computational models from network analysis and in silico interventions, which have not yet undergone large-scale clinical validation.

items.title: Rehabilitation technologies perceived positively by patients and facilitated intensive therapy within sessions
items.summary: 一项多方法研究发现，澳大利亚住院康复机构的患者普遍对康复技术持积极态度，且这些技术有助于在治疗会话中促进高强度治疗。
items.curatedReason: 患者普遍对康复技术持积极态度，且这些技术能促进会话内的高强度治疗。这意味着你可以放心地将这些康复技术整合到日常实践中，以提高治疗效果和患者参与度。

items.curatedReason: 此研究评估了髋关节镜术后 FAI 综合征的 3 个月康复方案，结果对于术后 PT 方案设计有直接参考价值。你需要了解其关注的功能性表现指标。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜术后股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）的 3 个月物理损伤和功能表现康复方案评估
items.summaryZh: 本研究评估了髋关节镜术后股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者为期 3 个月的基于物理损伤和功能表现的康复方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study evaluated a 3-month rehabilitation program post-hip arthroscopy for FAI syndrome, offering direct reference for postoperative PT program design. You should pay attention to its functional performance indicators.
items.limitation: 本研究可能缺乏对照组，无法直接评估康复方案的独立有效性，且随访期较短。
items.limitationEn: This study may lack a control group, making it impossible to directly assess the independent effectiveness of the rehabilitation program, and the follow-up period is relatively short.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Lived Experiences and Health Care Perspectives of People With Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome: A Systematic Review of Qualitative Studies
items.summary: This systematic review of qualitative studies explores the lived experiences and healthcare perspectives of individuals with Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 了解股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的真实生活体验和医疗保健视角，有助于你更好地与患者沟通，制定更具人性化的治疗计划。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活经历和医疗保健视角：定性研究的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项对定性研究的系统综述探讨了股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活经历和医疗保健视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding the lived experiences and healthcare perspectives of individuals with femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome can help you better communicate with patients and develop more patient-centered treatment plans.
items.limitation: 本系统综述整合的是定性研究，其结论更多是解释性和理解性的，而非量化效果评估。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review integrates qualitative studies, making its conclusions more interpretative and descriptive rather than quantitatively assessing effects.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Prevalence of Symphyseal Radiographic Findings and Skeletal Maturity and Their Relationship With Groin Symptoms in PROfessional FEmale Football Players: A Multicenter Cohort Study
items.summary: This multicenter cohort study investigated the prevalence of symphyseal radiographic findings and skeletal maturity, and their relationship with groin symptoms in professional female football players.
items.curatedReason: 职业女足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现与骨骼成熟度及其与腹股沟症状的关系，能帮助你更精准地评估高风险运动员。
items.titleZh: 职业女足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现和骨骼成熟度及其与腹股沟症状的关系：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项多中心队列研究调查了职业女足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现和骨骼成熟度，以及它们与腹股沟症状之间的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding the prevalence of symphyseal radiographic findings and skeletal maturity and their relationship with groin symptoms in professional female football players can help you more accurately assess high-risk athletes.
items.limitation: 本研究为队列研究，可能存在混杂因素，且其发现可能不完全适用于其他运动项目或非职业运动员。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, it may be subject to confounding factors, and its findings may not be fully generalizable to other sports or non-professional athletes.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Hip Muscle Strength Is Associated With Symptom Severity in People With Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome, but Only in Those With Preexisting Hip Muscle Weakness: A Secondary Analysis of Baseline Data From a Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A secondary analysis of an RCT baseline data found that hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity in FAI Syndrome patients, but only in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness.
items.curatedReason: 对于 FAI 综合征患者，髋关节肌力与症状严重程度的关联仅在已存在髋肌无力的人群中更明显。这意味着在评估时应更关注基线肌力较弱的患者。
items.titleZh: 髋关节肌力与股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者症状严重程度相关，但仅限于髋肌无力者：一项随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析发现，髋关节肌力与股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者的症状严重程度相关，但这种关联仅存在于那些原有髋关节肌肉无力的人群中。
items.curatedReasonEn: For FAI syndrome patients, hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity primarily in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness. This means you should pay more attention to patients with weaker baseline muscle strength during assessment.
items.limitation: 作为随机对照试验的二次分析，其结果受限于原始研究的设计和数据，可能存在未报告的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: As a secondary analysis of an RCT, its results are limited by the original study's design and data, potentially harboring unreported confounding factors.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Amplifying the Work of Emerging Leaders in Hip/Groin Pain Research
items.summary: This editorial highlights and supports the work of emerging leaders in the field of hip/groin pain research.
items.curatedReason: 了解髋/腹股沟疼痛领域的新兴研究者及其工作，有助于发现潜在的合作机会或未来研究方向。
items.titleZh: 推动髋/腹股沟疼痛研究领域新兴领袖的工作
items.summaryZh: 本文旨在突出并支持髋/腹股沟疼痛研究领域新兴领袖的工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding emerging leaders and their work in hip/groin pain research can help identify potential collaboration opportunities or future research directions.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Could Hip Dysplasia Be the Problem?
items.summary: This editorial asks whether hip dysplasia could be an underlying problem in certain patients.
items.curatedReason: 髋关节发育不良可能是一种被忽视的髋关节问题，你应在鉴别诊断中增加对其的考量。
items.titleZh: 髋关节发育不良会是问题所在吗？
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了髋关节发育不良是否可能是某些患者的潜在问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Hip dysplasia might be an overlooked hip issue; you should consider it more in differential diagnoses.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: This meta-analysis, including 25 RCTs, evaluated repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) for Parkinson's disease motor function, finding short-term therapeutic effects but highlighting the need for more research on long-term outcomes and optimal parameters.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 25 项 RCT 的 meta 分析指出重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病运动功能有短期改善，但长期效果和最佳参数尚不明确。将其作为辅助手段时，应向患者说明其局限性。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病运动功能疗效及调节因素的 Meta 分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 25 项随机对照试验的 Meta 分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病运动功能的影响，发现其有短期治疗效果，但强调需要更多研究来明确长期疗效和最佳参数。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis of 25 RCTs indicates that rTMS offers short-term motor function improvement in Parkinson's disease, but long-term efficacy and optimal parameters are unclear. When using it as an adjunct, inform patients about its limitations.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告具体效应量和异质性程度，且对长期疗效的证据不足。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report specific effect sizes or heterogeneity, and evidence for long-term efficacy is insufficient.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers are concurrently associated with physical activity levels, highlighting the complex interplay of these factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究提示，评估肥胖女性的功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍，有助于更全面理解其身体活动水平低的原因，并指导制定个性化干预方案。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究发现，功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与身体活动水平之间存在关联，提示这些因素之间复杂的相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity suggests that assessing functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers helps to comprehensively understand reasons for low physical activity and guide personalized interventions.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面，无法确立因果关系；样本量较小（n=85）。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and the sample size is relatively small (n=85).
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study classified movement patterns of 23 individuals with stroke passing through narrow openings, identifying stroke-specific patterns distinct from age-matched controls, which involved difficulty rotating the trunk and adjusting the supporting foot.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分类了卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式，有助于临床医师更精细地评估患者的功能受限，并针对性地进行步态和平衡训练。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式：一项横断面研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究对 23 名卒中患者通过狭窄开口时的运动模式进行了分类，识别出与年龄匹配对照组不同的卒中特定模式，主要表现为躯干旋转和支撑足调整困难。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study classified stroke-specific movement patterns when passing through narrow openings, aiding clinicians in more precise functional assessment and targeted gait and balance training.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（23 名卒中患者），且研究设计为横断面。
items.limitationEn: The sample size is small (23 stroke individuals), and the study design is cross-sectional.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This cross-sectional pilot study of 30 adults with post-stroke spasticity in Mexico successfully cross-culturally adapted the PRISM scale into Mexican Spanish and demonstrated its internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 量表在墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者中的跨文化适应性和初步心理测量学评估表明其具有内部一致性。这将为评估该人群痉挛对生活的影响提供一个患者报告结局工具。
items.titleZh: 用于卒中后痉挛的 PRISM-MX：在墨西哥样本中的跨文化适应和初步心理测量学评估。
items.summaryZh: 这项对墨西哥 30 名卒中后痉挛成人进行的横断面试点研究，成功将 PRISM 量表进行了墨西哥西班牙语的跨文化适应，并证明了其内部一致性和初步收敛效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-cultural adaptation and preliminary psychometric evaluation of the PRISM-MX scale in Mexican post-stroke spasticity patients show internal consistency, providing a patient-reported outcome measure for assessing the impact of spasticity in this population.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的横断面试点研究，样本量小（n=30），且限于墨西哥卒中人群。
items.limitationEn: This is a preliminary cross-sectional pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), limited to a Mexican stroke population.
items.journal: NeuroRehabilitation

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional mixed retrospective and prospective study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% of 94 children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and showed good adherence, with socioeconomic and cultural factors influencing these rates.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性的障碍。在发展中国家执业的 PT 可以参考这些社会经济和文化因素，设计更具可达性的干预方案。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童物理治疗的早期可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究。
items.summaryZh: 喀麦隆一项回顾性与前瞻性混合的横断面研究发现，94 名脑瘫儿童中仅有 38.3% 早期（5 个月前）接受物理治疗并表现出良好依从性，社会经济和文化因素影响了这些比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study highlights barriers to early access and adherence to physiotherapy for children with cerebral palsy in Cameroon. PTs practicing in developing countries can consider these socioeconomic and cultural factors to design more accessible interventions.
items.limitation: 研究为医院回顾性数据和 caregiver 访谈的混合设计，可能存在回忆偏倚；研究结果的外推性受地理和文化背景限制。
items.limitationEn: The study's mixed retrospective design and caregiver interviews may introduce recall bias; generalizability is limited by geographical and cultural context.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: This commentary highlights loneliness as a significant public health problem, exacerbated by debilitating injuries like spinal cord injury, which can limit social interactions and heighten feelings of isolation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究探讨了脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素。作为临床 PT，需要关注患者的社会心理健康，在康复方案中考虑如何促进社会参与，减轻孤独感。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素。
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论文章强调孤独感是一个重大的公共卫生问题，脊髓损伤等致残性损伤会加剧孤独感，限制社交互动，加剧隔离感。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores correlates of loneliness in individuals with spinal cord injury. As a clinical PT, you need to address patients' psychosocial well-being and consider how to foster social engagement to mitigate loneliness in rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，无法评估因果关系或潜在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not specified, preventing assessment of causality or potential biases.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Read more about Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC) Proposed Rule (CMS-1850-P)
items.summary: The CMS has issued its proposed rule for the Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC), which will dictate payment policies for these settings.
items.curatedReason: 这是 CMS 针对 2027 财年的门诊医院和门诊手术中心（ASC）支付系统提出的初步规则。密切关注最终规则，因为它将直接影响未来一年这些机构的物理治疗服务报销费率和政策。
items.titleZh: CMS 公布 2027 财年医院门诊支付系统（OPPS）和门诊手术中心（ASC）拟议规则
items.summaryZh: CMS 公布了 2027 财年医院门诊前瞻性支付系统（OPPS）和门诊手术中心（ASC）的拟议规则，将影响这些机构的支付政策。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is CMS's proposed rule for the Calendar Year 2027 Hospital Outpatient Prospective Payment System (OPPS) and Ambulatory Surgical Center (ASC). Pay close attention to the final rule, as it will directly impact reimbursement rates and policies for physical therapy services in these settings for the coming year.

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients undergoing primary total knee arthroplasty found no significant association between preoperative physiotherapy and improved patient-reported outcomes or pain at 2 months and 1 year postoperatively.
items.curatedReason: 队列研究显示，术前物理治疗与全膝关节置换术后 1 年患者报告结局的改善没有显著关联。这提示术前干预的价值可能不如预期，在临床实践中应审慎评估其额外投入。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后 1 年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的 1,688 例患者队列研究发现，接受初次全膝关节置换术的患者中，术前物理治疗与术后 2 个月和 1 年的患者报告结局或疼痛改善无显著关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cohort study indicates that preoperative physiotherapy is not significantly associated with improved 1-year patient-reported outcomes after total knee arthroplasty. This suggests the value of preoperative interventions may be less than anticipated, and its added cost should be carefully evaluated in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为队列研究，无法完全排除混杂因素对结局的影响，且研究终点为患者报告结局。
items.limitationEn: This is a cohort study, which cannot fully rule out confounding factors influencing the outcomes, and the primary endpoints are patient-reported outcomes.
items.journal: Journal of rehabilitation medicine

items.title: Relationship Between Sarcopenia and Intensity-Specific Physical Activity in Older Adults Living in a Rural Area: An Isotemporal Substitution Analysis from the NEIGE Study.
items.summary: This study found that in community-dwelling older adults (n=527), replacing sedentary behavior with moderate-to-vigorous physical activity was associated with a lower risk of sarcopenia, using an isotemporal substitution model.
items.curatedReason: 在农村老年人群中，将久坐行为替换为中高强度身体活动与更低的肌少症风险相关。建议鼓励老年患者进行强度更高的活动，作为肌少症预防策略的重要组成部分。
items.titleZh: 农村老年人肌少症与强度特异性身体活动的关系：NEIGE 研究的等时替代分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，在社区老年人（n=527）中，使用等时替代模型分析显示，将久坐行为替换为中高强度身体活动与较低的肌少症风险相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Replacing sedentary behavior with moderate-to-vigorous physical activity is associated with lower sarcopenia risk in rural older adults. Encourage higher-intensity physical activity in older patients as a key component of sarcopenia prevention strategies.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面观察研究，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study design is a cross-sectional observational study, which cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Journal of geriatric physical therapy (2001)

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF) on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 老年骨质疏松上肢脆性骨折患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法及需求，强调了这些心理因素在康复规划中的重要性。在制订康复方案时，请务必将其纳入考量，以促进患者的积极参与和依从性。
items.titleZh: 老年骨质疏松上肢脆性骨折患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法与需求。
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了骨质疏松合并上肢脆性骨折的老年患者对健康顾虑、跌倒及跌倒恐惧对日常生活的影响以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The perspectives and needs of older adults with osteoporosis and upper extremity fragility fractures regarding fall risk and fear of falling highlight the importance of these psychological factors in rehabilitation planning. Ensure to incorporate them into rehabilitation programs to foster patient engagement and adherence.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果的普适性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of its findings.
items.journal: Journal of geriatric physical therapy (2001)

items.title: Better immediate declarative memory is associated with forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke and in older adults
items.summary: This study found that in individuals with chronic stroke (n=23) and age-matched controls (n=21), better immediate declarative memory was associated with greater forgetting during locomotor adaptation.
items.curatedReason: 慢性卒中患者和老年人的即时陈述性记忆能力越好，在运动适应过程中遗忘越多。这提示在神经康复中，需要关注认知功能与运动学习之间的复杂交互，特别是在制定训练策略时。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中和老年人更好的即时陈述性记忆与步态适应过程中的遗忘相关。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，在慢性卒中患者（n=23）和年龄匹配对照组（n=21）中，更好的即时陈述性记忆与步态适应过程中的更大程度遗忘相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Better immediate declarative memory is associated with more forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke patients and older adults. This suggests that in neurorehabilitation, the complex interplay between cognitive function and motor learning needs attention, especially when designing training strategies.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，且为观察性研究，无法建立直接因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size and is observational, precluding the establishment of direct causality.

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review identified weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury, highlighting a lack of clear consensus despite high recurrence rates.
items.curatedReason: 腘绳肌损伤的重返运动标准仍缺乏共识。这份系统综述梳理了现有文献，提供了一份加权标准分析，能帮你初步评估不同标准的权重和依据，但仍需等待更高质量的研究来给出明确的 RTP 路径。
items.titleZh: 建立腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准：一项系统综述与方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述确定了腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准，发现现有文献缺乏明确共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: Consensus on return-to-play criteria for hamstring injuries is still lacking. This systematic review provides an analysis of weighted criteria from existing literature, which can help you initially assess the evidence for different standards, but definitive RTP guidelines will require higher-quality research.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性可能影响了加权标准的普遍适用性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included studies may impact the generalizability of the weighted criteria.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis of 17 trials (n=1,372) found that shortwave diathermy significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [not reported]) in knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 短波透热疗法对膝骨关节炎的疼痛和行走能力有显著改善，效应量临床相关。在你的非手术KOA管理方案中，应考虑将其作为一种有效的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与Meta分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项包含17项试验（n=1,372）的系统综述与Meta分析发现，短波透热疗法显著改善了膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（平均值 -2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和行走能力（平均值 -0.72；95% CI [未报告]）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Shortwave diathermy significantly improves pain and walking ability in knee osteoarthritis, with clinically relevant effect sizes. You should consider it as an effective adjunct in your non-surgical KOA management protocols.
items.limitation: 虽然纳入了17项试验，但可能存在异质性，且未报告GRADE证据确定性。
items.limitationEn: Although 17 trials were included, heterogeneity may exist, and GRADE certainty of evidence was not reported.
items.journal: Physiotherapy theory and practice

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: A scoping review of 18 studies on neurological conditions (stroke, spinal cord injury, multiple sclerosis) identified and mapped behavior change theories and techniques in self-management interventions to improve functioning outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述揭示了神经疾病自我管理干预的理论和策略，为你的临床实践提供了现有证据的概览，但强调仍需更多高质量研究。
items.titleZh: 神经系统疾病中的自我管理：行为改变理论、策略、内容及影响的范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖18项研究（包括卒中、脊髓损伤、多发性硬化）的范围综述，识别并梳理了旨在改善神经系统疾病患者功能结果的自我管理干预中的行为改变理论和技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review reveals the theories and strategies behind self-management interventions for neurological disorders, offering an overview of current evidence for your clinical practice, but emphasizes the need for more high-quality research.
items.limitation: 纳入研究数量有限（18项），且涵盖的神经系统疾病类型较为广泛，可能影响其特异性。
items.limitationEn: The limited number of included studies (18) and the broad range of neurological conditions covered may affect specificity.
items.journal: Disability and rehabilitation

items.title: Read more about CMS Proposes Updates to Strengthen Medicare Program Integrity, Combat Fraud, and Expand Access to Home Health Care
items.summary: CMS proposes updates to strengthen Medicare program integrity, combat fraud, and expand access to home health care in the US.
items.curatedReason: 美国 CMS 发布了加强 Medicare 项目诚信、打击欺诈并扩大居家健康护理可及性的拟议更新。这些政策直接影响居家物理治疗服务的报销和合规要求，提醒你关注其最终规则，以调整你的运营和实践。
items.titleZh: CMS 提议更新以加强 Medicare 项目诚信、打击欺诈并扩大居家健康护理可及性
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心（CMS）提议更新其政策，旨在加强 Medicare 项目的诚信，打击欺诈，并扩大居家健康护理服务的可及性。
items.curatedReasonEn: CMS has released proposed updates to strengthen Medicare program integrity, combat fraud, and expand access to home health care in the US. These policies directly impact reimbursement and compliance requirements for home physical therapy services, urging you to monitor the final rules to adjust your operations and practice.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study based on interviews with 11 patients and 10 physiotherapists in Norway found that AI-powered clinical decision support systems influence the decision-making process by impacting decision-making authority in musculoskeletal care.
items.curatedReason: AI 辅助的临床决策支持系统（CDSS）正在进入物理治疗领域。这篇定性研究揭示了治疗师和患者在采纳 AI 推荐时的决策过程，提醒你在引入新技术时，不仅要看算法效果，还要考虑它对医患互动和决策权的影响。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对挪威 11 名肌肉骨骼疾病患者和 10 名物理治疗师的访谈定性研究发现，AI 驱动的临床决策支持系统通过影响决策权力，改变了肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策过程。
items.curatedReasonEn: AI-assisted clinical decision support systems (CDSSs) are entering physical therapy. This qualitative study reveals how therapists and patients navigate decisions when adopting AI recommendations, reminding you that beyond algorithmic effectiveness, consider its impact on clinician-patient interaction and decision-making authority when implementing new technologies.
items.limitation: 本研究为挪威初级保健系统的定性研究，样本量小，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size from the Norwegian primary healthcare system, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: BMC musculoskeletal disorders
